title: Model Training Pipeline
description: ML Engineer launches and manages training runs for diffusion world models (3DGS + multiview diffusion)

actors.name: ML Engineer
actors.description: Launches training, monitors progress, resumes runs, configures hyperparameters

actors.name: WandB
actors.description: Experiment tracking and metrics logging (log_with=wandb, tags=['cosmos_3dgs'])

actors.name: Distributed GPU Cluster
actors.description: Multi-GPU execution via Accelerate (FSDP / DeepSpeed ZeRO-2 / DDP)

use_cases.name: Launch Training Run
use_cases.details: CLI args parsed via argparse; configs merged with OmegaConf.merge(schema, config, cli_overrides)

use_cases.name: Configure Training Parameters
use_cases.description: Load and validate OmegaConf config; prepare_config() sets LOCAL_RANK, vae_path, use_lora defaults
use_cases.details: Supports mixed_precision (fp16/bf16), batch_size, learning_rate, gradient_accumulation_steps, max_train_steps

use_cases.name: Initialize Distributed Backend
use_cases.description: Accelerator is created with chosen parallelism strategy: FSDP, DeepSpeed ZeRO-2, or plain DDP
use_cases.details: DeepSpeedPlugin: zero_stage=2, train_micro_batch_size_per_gpu. FSDP: FullStateDictConfig. DistributedDataParallelKwargs for gradient accumulation

use_cases.name: Load Pretrained VAE
use_cases.description: VAE loaded inside deepspeed_zero_init_disabled_context_manager() to prevent ZeRO-3 partitioning
use_cases.details: load_vae(config.vae_backbone, config.vae_path); frozen (requires_grad=False); optionally compiled with torch.compile

use_cases.name: Initialize Model
use_cases.description: Instantiate LatentRecon(config) as the trainable transformer. For diffusion pipeline, MultiviewDiffusionModel or MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel is used
use_cases.details: MultiviewDiffusionModel extends DiffusionModel; MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel extends ExtendDiffusionModel. Both add n_views attribute and multiview-aware encode/decode

use_cases.name: Configure LoRA Adapters
use_cases.description: Optional LoRA fine-tuning via PEFT: LoraConfig(r=64, lora_alpha=64, target_modules=['to_k','to_q','to_v','to_out.0'])
use_cases.details: transformer.add_adapter(lora_config); trainable params filtered by lora_params list; saved separately via save_lora_weights

use_cases.name: Resume Training from Checkpoint
use_cases.description: resume_from_ckpt(): loads accelerator state or falls back to model-only weights via load_model_weights()
use_cases.details: Supports 'latest' (get_most_recent_checkpoint) or explicit checkpoint path. global_step and first_epoch recovered from path. Corrupt checkpoints are deleted automatically

use_cases.name: Create Multi-view DataLoaders
use_cases.description: get_multi_dataloader(config, accelerator) returns train_dataloader and test_dataloader
use_cases.details: Supports variable num_input_multi_views per batch; WebDataset (wds) loader enabled by default

use_cases.name: Execute Training Step
use_cases.description: train_step(batch, train_loss, num_input_multi_views): full forward-backward pass per accumulation step
use_cases.details: Steps: (1) move tensors to device+dtype, (2) encode_multi_view_video(vae, video), (3) get_plucker_embedding_and_rays, (4) encode_latent_time_vae / encode_plucker_vae optionally, (5) transformer(batch) forward, (6) compute_loss(pred_images, gt_images, pred_depths, gt_depths, pred_opacity), (7) accelerator.backward(loss), (8) clip_grad_norm_, (9) optimizer.step(), (10) lr_scheduler.step()

use_cases.name: Train Multiview Diffusion Model
use_cases.description: MultiviewDiffusionModel.compute_loss_with_epsilon_and_sigma(): handles context parallelism for multi-GPU, splits x0/epsilon across CP group
use_cases.details: encode(): rearranges B C (V T) H W -> (B V) C T H W before VAE. Context parallel: split_inputs_cp / cat_outputs_cp. Calls super(DiffusionModel).compute_loss_with_epsilon_and_sigma

use_cases.name: Train Video Extension Model
use_cases.description: MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel.denoise(): adds conditioning from gt_latent frames (first_n or first_random_n frames)
use_cases.details: add_condition_video_indicator_and_video_input_mask() builds binary indicator tensor. Augments conditional latent with noise. Composes: new_xt = indicator*augment_latent + (1-indicator)*noise_x. Supports normalize_condition_latent and compute_loss_for_condition_region flags

use_cases.name: Generate Diffusion Samples
use_cases.description: generate_samples_from_batch(): classifier-free guidance sampling with ODE solver
use_cases.details: MultiviewDiffusionModel: get_x0_fn_from_batch -> conditioner.get_condition_uncondition -> sampler(x0_fn, x_sigma_max, num_steps=35, solver_option='2ab'). MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel: get_x0_fn_from_batch_with_condition_latent requires condition_latent tensor

use_cases.name: Save Training Checkpoint
use_cases.description: Every checkpointing_steps: accelerator.save_state(checkpoint-{global_step}). Respects checkpoints_total_limit; permanent_checkpointing_steps checkpoints are exempt from pruning
use_cases.details: save_model_hook saves transformer (+ ema_transformer if use_ema) + LoRA weights. Multi-process: save_random_state per rank. FSDP/DeepSpeed: all processes save

use_cases.name: Monitor Training Metrics
use_cases.description: accelerator.log({'train_loss', 'lr'}, step=global_step); WandB run named via --wandb_run_name, group via --wandb_group_name
use_cases.details: Tags: ['cosmos_3dgs']. Overflow detection: logs 'overflow' and gradient scaler value. Config saved to output_dir/config.yaml

use_cases.name: Stop Training Run
use_cases.description: Training loop terminates when global_step >= max_train_steps or global_step % job_stop_steps == 0
use_cases.details: accelerator.wait_for_everyone(); accelerator.end_training(); wandb.finish() in finally block

use_case_relationships.note: Optional LoRA on top of model init

key_classes.name: MultiviewDiffusionModel
key_methods: generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance=1.5, seed=1, num_steps=35, solver_option='2ab') -> Tensor

key_classes.name: LatentRecon
key_classes.role: Primary trainable transformer in train.py (3DGS reconstruction)

key_functions: deepspeed_zero_init_disabled_context_manager(): returns [zero3_init_context_manager(enable=False)] or [] — prevents ZeRO-3 partitioning of frozen models
train_step(batch, train_loss, num_input_multi_views): full training iteration encapsulating encode→forward→loss→backward→optimizer
resume_from_ckpt(config, accelerator, transformer): checkpoint resumption with fallback to model-only weights
encode_multi_view_video(vae, video, num_input_multi_views, vae_backbone): batched multiview VAE encoding
get_plucker_embedding_and_rays(intrinsics, c2ws, img_size, ...): camera-ray Plucker embedding computation on GPU
compute_loss(accelerator, train_loss, pred_images, gt_images, pred_depths, gt_depths, pred_opacity, config, lpips_module): combined RGB+depth+opacity+LPIPS loss

distributed_strategy.context_parallel: megatron.core parallel_state; split_inputs_cp/cat_outputs_cp on temporal dim
distributed_strategy.precision: float16 or bfloat16 for VAE+frozen; float32 or weight_dtype for transformer

important_notes: deepspeed_zero_init_disabled_context_manager is a closure defined inside main() — ensures VAE loaded outside ZeRO-3 partitioning
MultiviewDiffusionModel and MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel share same encode/decode pattern: rearrange B C (V T) H W <-> (B V) C T H W before/after VAE
train.py (Lyra-1/train.py) trains LatentRecon (3DGS) model; diffusion/training/train.py trains MultiviewDiffusionModel via separate launcher (launch() function)
FSDPDiffusionModel and FSDPExtendDiffusionModel are decorator-wrapped variants for FSDP execution
Classifier-free guidance: raw_x0 = cond_x0 + guidance * (cond_x0 - uncond_x0); optional dual-guidance for trajectory conditioning
Video extension: condition_location supports 'first_n' (inference) and 'first_random_n' (training) strategies
LoRA target modules: to_k, to_q, to_v, to_out.0 (attention projections only)
